originalTitle: Anthropic is launching Claude Cowork on mobile and web
summary: Starting Tuesday, Anthropic's Claude Cowork AI platform will be available on mobile and web for the first time. The expanded access is rolling out first to Max subscribers and coming to Claude users on other plans "in the coming weeks." Claude Cowork was previously only accessible through the Claude desktop app for macOS and Windows, […]
content: Starting Tuesday, Anthropic’s Claude Cowork AI platform will be available on mobile and web for the first time. The expanded access is rolling out first to Max subscribers and coming to Claude users on other plans “in the coming weeks.”  Claude Cowork was previously only accessible through the Claude desktop app for macOS and Windows, but now users on iOS and Android can also use it. However, Anthropic says the “full experience” for Cowork will still be on the desktop app, including features like local file access.  Cowork sessions will also now run in the cloud by default, so you can continue them across different devices or run Cowork tasks in the background even when your laptop is closed. There’s still an option for local processing on the desktop app, where users can switch between cloud and local processing. Additionally, scheduled tasks will now run even when none of your devices are online. Claude can also send Cowork notifications to your phone when it has something ready for you to review or approve.  Alongside Cowork’s mobile and web launch, Anthropic is also extending its doubled Cowork usage limits through August 5th.
chineseTitle: Anthropic 正在移动和网络上推出 Claude Cowork
chineseSummary: 从周二开始，Anthropic 的 Claude Cowork 人工智能平台将首次在移动和网络上推出。扩展的访问权限将首先向 Max 订阅者推出，并在“未来几周内”按照其他计划向 Claude 用户推出。 Claude Cowork 以前只能通过适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的 Claude 桌面应用程序访问，[...]
chineseContent: 从周二开始，Anthropic 的 Claude Cowork 人工智能平台将首次在移动和网络上推出。扩展的访问权限将首先向 Max 订阅者推出，并在“未来几周内”按照其他计划向 Claude 用户推出。  Claude Cowork 以前只能通过适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的 Claude 桌面应用程序进行访问，但现在 iOS 和 Android 上的用户也可以使用它。然而，Anthropic 表示，Cowork 的“完整体验”仍将在桌面应用程序上，包括本地文件访问等功能。  默认情况下，Cowork 会话现在也将在云中运行，因此您可以在不同的设备上继续它们，或者即使在笔记本电脑关闭时也可以在后台运行 Cowork 任务。桌面应用程序上仍然有本地处理选项，用户可以在云处理和本地处理之间切换。此外，即使您的设备均不在线，计划任务现在也会运行。当 Cowork 有可供您审核或批准的内容时，Claude 还可以向您的手机发送通知。  除了 Cowork 的移动和网络发布之外，Anthropic 还将其双倍的 Cowork 使用限制延长至 8 月 5 日。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
